datasources.title: Data Sources
datasources.description: Configure and manage your database connections
datasources.name: Name

empty.title: No data sources configured
empty.description: Connect your first database to begin exploring schemas and generating reports.
empty.selectOrAdd: Select or add a data source
empty.selectOrAddDesc: Select a data source from the left panel, or add a new one to get started.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Data Source
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone and all associated knowledge graph data will be removed.

kg.title: Knowledge Graph

empty.title: No knowledge graph yet
empty.description: Select a data source and refresh to generate an entity relationship graph.
empty.selectFromSidebar: Select a data source from the left panel to view its knowledge graph.
empty.runIntrospect: Click "Introspect" to scan the schema and generate a knowledge graph.

kg.noSchema: No schema yet. Run introspection first.
kg.noDesc: No description yet. Add business notes to help AI generate more accurate SQL.
kg.tableDescPlaceholder: Describe this table's business meaning, purpose, field semantics, etc. to help AI generate more precise SQL...

conv.title: Conversation

empty.title: Ask a question about your data
empty.description: Describe what you want to analyze. AI will generate SQL data pools, and you can combine them into reports.

conv.placeholder: Describe the analysis or report you need...
conv.likeHint: Mark as good answer (saves as AI training example)

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: View and manage your generated reports
reports.createHint: Name a blank report to create it, then add data and let AI build the dashboard.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Report
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

empty.title: No reports yet
empty.description: Start a conversation with AI, select data pools, and generate your first report.

notFound.title: Report not found
notFound.description: This report may have been deleted or doesn't exist.

reportDetail.noVisualizations: No visualizations configured for this report.
reportDetail.useAIRender: Use the AI render bar above to automatically generate charts from your data pools.
reportDetail.aiRenderPlaceholder: Describe how you want to visualize this data...
reportDetail.aiComposeSuccess: AI generated the dashboard! Switch to edit mode to fine-tune.
reportDetail.aiComposeFailed: AI generation failed. Check data sources and LLM config.
reportDetail.rollbackSuccess: Rolled back to the published version
reportDetail.publishedToast: Published — the public link is now live
reportDetail.unpublishedToast: Unpublished — the public link is now offline

themes.title: Saved themes
themes.saveCurrentHint: Save this report's style as a reusable theme
themes.useHint: Generate a report using this theme
themes.saveHint: Saves this report's visual style (colors, typography, cards, chart styling) as a template you can reuse to generate future reports in one click.
themes.name: Theme name
themes.descPlaceholder: Briefly describe when to use this theme
themes.stylePromptPlaceholder: e.g. gold accent, large KPI numbers, cool-toned charts
themes.stylePromptHint: Used together with the template as style guidance for the AI
themes.applyPrefix: Strictly follow the "{{name}}" theme's visual style. On top of that:
themes.applyDefault: Regenerate the full dashboard from the current data, strictly following the "{{name}}" theme's visual style and layout.

summary.title: AI Data Summary
summary.emptyHint: Let AI analyze this report's data — key findings, trends, anomalies, and recommendations.
summary.qaHint: Ask about this report's data, metrics, and how they relate — e.g. "Which metric dropped the most?" or "Is A correlated with B?"

deleteVersionConfirm.title: Delete Version
deleteVersionConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete version v{{version}}? This cannot be undone.

reportDetail.canvasDragHint: Drag data sources from the left panel to add charts
reportDetail.canvasHint: Add data sources from your metric library, then let AI arrange the layout for you.

templatePicker.title: Choose a Report Template
templatePicker.description: Pick a template style and AI will auto-generate a matching dashboard from your data. Or start from scratch.

executive.name: Executive Cockpit
executive.desc: KPI cards + trend charts + comparisons + detail table

sales.name: Sales Analysis
sales.desc: Revenue KPIs + monthly trends + regional comparison + TOP rankings

operations.name: Operations Monitor
operations.desc: Real-time metrics + ring progress + anomaly trends + data table

financial.name: Financial Overview
financial.desc: Revenue/expense KPIs + profit trend + cost breakdown + budget comparison

marketing.name: Marketing Analytics
marketing.desc: Conversion funnel + user growth + channel ROI + key metrics

custom.name: Custom Build
custom.desc: Start from a blank canvas and add widgets manually

assignMetrics.title: Assign Metrics to Template
assignMetrics.description: Select a metric for each slot. The data will fill the corresponding chart.
assignMetrics.noMetricsHint: Generate data in conversations and save to metrics first.

reportDetail.aiPlaceholder: Tell AI how to arrange this report... e.g. "show KPIs on top, bar chart below"
reportDetail.aiGenerateHint: Describe the dashboard you want... e.g. "dark themed sales cockpit with KPIs and trend charts"
reportDetail.aiRefineHint: Tell AI how to adjust... e.g. "change bar to line chart" "make title bigger" "add a pie chart"
reportDetail.aiGenerating: AI is generating the HTML page, please wait...
reportDetail.backgroundHint: You can switch to other pages and come back when it's done
reportDetail.generationBackground: Report is generating in the background, check back later

htmlEmpty.title: Ready to Generate
htmlEmpty.description: Add data sources, then describe the dashboard style you want in the input below. AI will generate a complete visualization page.
htmlEmpty.hint: Tip: Add data sources first, then use AI to generate. You can refine the design through conversation.

metrics.title: Metric Library
metrics.description: Saved queries and data indicators organized by topic
metrics.emptyGroup: No metrics in this group yet
metrics.dropHere: Drop here to move to this group

deleteGroupConfirm.title: Delete Group
deleteGroupConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? Metrics in this group will become ungrouped.

empty.title: No saved metrics yet
empty.description: Bookmark useful queries from conversations to build your metric library.
empty.selectMetricDesc: Click a metric from the left panel to view its SQL and data.

metrics.noData: No cached data. Click refresh to execute the query.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure LLM provider and platform preferences
settings.apiKeyKeepHint: A key is saved. Leave blank to keep it, or type a new value to replace it.

aiPanel.metricPlaceholder: Ask about this metric... e.g. "add a date filter"
aiPanel.askData: Ask a question about your data. I'll write SQL and execute it for you.

assetPanel.convHint: Conversation list is shown in the main area

kb.title: AI Knowledge Base
kb.contentPlaceholder: Detailed description (field meanings, business rules, table relationships, etc.)
kb.emptyHint: Knowledge accumulates automatically from conversations. You can also add entries manually.

logs.title: AI Logs
logs.description: View all AI request records and details

login.setupHint: First time? Create an admin account
login.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

errors.noKnowledgeGraph: No knowledge graph found. Run introspection first.

snapshots.title: Data Snapshots
snapshots.description: Periodically record metric data for YoY/MoM comparison
snapshots.noSchedulesHint: Set up periodic snapshots for your metrics to track historical data for comparison analysis.

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm Delete
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete this schedule? All associated snapshot data will also be removed.

alerts.title: Email Alerts
alerts.description: Threshold-based metric alerts on a schedule, with AI-generated email templates and Excel data attachments
alerts.noRulesHint: Set threshold conditions on metrics to send alert emails automatically.
alerts.selectOrCreate: Select an alert rule on the left, or create one
alerts.smtpNotConfigured: Email server not configured. Click the gear icon to set it up.
alerts.bodyPlaceholder: HTML email body. Leave empty to use the default template.
alerts.placeholderHint: Placeholders (wrap in double braces): metric_name, value, threshold, condition, time, row_count, table

validation.nameMetric: Please enter a rule name and select a metric
validation.recipients: Please add at least one recipient email
validation.channel: Add at least one recipient email, or enable "Push to Feishu"

smtp.testToRequired: Please enter a test recipient email

feishu.webhookHint: Get it from your Feishu group: Settings → Bots → Add Custom Bot
feishu.secretHint: Fill in if the bot has the "signed verification" security setting enabled; leave empty to skip signing
feishu.webhookRequired: Please enter the Webhook URL first

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm Delete
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete this alert rule? Its send history will also be removed.
